/io_list/interfaces/apb_control.answer: Keep the reference APB-like psel/penable/pwrite/paddr/pwdata/prdata interface for the first compatibility pass; no pready/pslverr.

/parameters/COUNTER_WIDTH.answer: Keep 16-bit and 32-bit modes parameterized, defaulting to the reference 16-bit configuration.

/cdc_requirements/crossings.answer: Treat extclk and wdt_pause as asynchronous inputs synchronized into pclk by generated local logic.

/function_model/transactions.answer: Lock the observed CR.INTTIME and CR.RSTTIME counter-bit tap tables for compatibility.

/quality_gates/rtl_gen/profile.answer: Use standard local evidence for this first FL -> RTL -> TB -> sim -> lint iteration; production gates can follow after behavior stabilizes.

/custom/assumptions.answer: RTL engineer approved all first-pass recommended defaults.
